name: Baichuan AI API
description: Developer API for Baichuans open- and closed-source LLMs (Baichuan3/4) with chat, embeddings and fine-tuning.

seo.title: Baichuan AI API — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Baichuan AI API: Developer API for Baichuans open- and closed-source LLMs (Baichuan3/4) with chat, embeddings and fine-tuning.

when_to_use: Building Chinese-language chatbots with Baichuan3 API
Generating text embeddings for semantic search in Mandarin
Fine-tuning Baichuan models on domain-specific corpora
Low-cost LLM inference for high-volume Chinese content tasks

pros: Open and closed model tiers available
review.verdict: A credible Chinese-market alternative to Qwen and Doubao; less relevant globally.
review.best_for: Chinese developers building chat and RAG apps in Mandarin
review.not_for: Western teams with US or EU data residency constraints
